results.trackCensoredName: Chronicles of an Aristocrat Reborn in Another World (Manga) Vol. 14
results.trackName: Chronicles of an Aristocrat Reborn in Another World (Manga) Vol. 14
results.description: Cain von Silford Drientl has finally defeated the Disciple of the God of Evil, Marquis Corgino. He achieved this victory in large part due to being blessed by the gods with a massive amount of divine power, making him the Disciple of the Gods of Creation. However, Cain's work is far from over. Lizabeth, the high-ranking noble demon he rescued from a fighting pit in Irsten, now wants him to travel to the Demon Realm, where the flames of war are being fanned. Can the reckless young Cain aid her cause and avoid war on another front, or is this a fight too big for even a hero blessed by the gods?!
